description_long: This bathtub features a rectangular exterior clad in a striking dark green marble pattern with white veining, giving it a luxurious and modern appearance. The interior is a smooth, white, oval-shaped basin that contrasts elegantly with the exterior. A metallic faucet and handles are mounted on one end, providing both functional and aesthetic value. The tub's edges are straight and clean, with the marble surface extending seamlessly around all sides. The drain is centrally located at one end of the basin, ensuring efficient water removal. The overall design suggests a high-end, freestanding installation suitable for upscale urban environments.
description: A rectangular marble-patterned bathtub with a white oval basin, metallic faucet, and modern luxury design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the marble-patterned exterior, white basin, and faucet on the left.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the oval white basin, visible drain, and marble pattern on the front panel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the faucet now on the right, showing the same marble exterior and white basin.
description_view_3: Rear view with the faucet and handles centered, emphasizing the marble pattern and the tub's rectangular shape.
